column3: INCIDENT: Red Cross SDB team members were assaulted and beaten at the cemetery.

Fifteen healthcare providers from four health facilities were briefed on standard precautions, waste management, and handwashing. Another 14 healthcare providers from four additional facilities were briefed on handwashing, biocleaning, and waste management. Decontamination was carried out at the Saint-Nicolas orphanage. A ring opening was conducted around the same orphanage, covering three health facilities, 13 churches, and 433 households.
